description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:git Docker image with a docker:dind service, sets the CONTAINER_IMAGE variable to registry.gitlab.com/codebabel/$CI_PROJECT_NAME, and defines DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2 and DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker:2375. Include a before_script that runs docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com. Define a single stage called "build and stage" and a job named "job 1" in that stage that executes the commands docker build -t $CONTAINER_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA . and docker push $CONTAINER_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA to build and push the image to the GitLab Container Registry.
